signals.headline: Ongoing divisions in the National Governors Association over Trump's deployments of National Guard troops across state l
signals.raw: Ongoing divisions in the National Governors Association over Trump's deployments of National Guard troops across state lines (e.g., to Chicago and Portland), with Democratic governors like California's Newsom and Illinois' Pritzker threatening to leave; Kansas' Democratic Gov. Kelly is noted as already having left earlier this year, but no fresh confirmations or resolutions reported.[3]

signals.headline: Kansas Republicans reacting positively in early 2026 to President Trump's State of the Union speech, praising policies o
signals.raw: Kansas Republicans reacting positively in early 2026 to President Trump's State of the Union speech, praising policies on economy, borders, and crime, with no new announcements tied to Kelly or Kansas governance.[2]

signals.raw:
I don't have access to real-time information about what Polymarket traders are currently posting on X (Twitter) or their live discussions about specific bets and market movements.
